summary.en: Singapore-based payment gateway unifying bank and card payments across Southeast Asia, now part of Fazz/StraitsX.
summary.zh: 總部位於新加坡的支付閘道,整合東南亞銀行與信用卡支付,現為 Fazz/StraitsX 的一部分。

highlight.en: Dubbed the 'PayPal of Southeast Asia,' Xfers became regional payments infrastructure and a YC SEA fintech success story. In 2021 it merged with Indonesia's PayFazz to form Fazz Financial Group, and its rails now power the StraitsX XSGD stablecoin.
highlight.zh: 被稱為「東南亞的 PayPal」,Xfers 成為區域支付基礎設施,也是 YC 東南亞金融科技的成功案例。2021 年與印尼 PayFazz 合併成立 Fazz Financial Group,其支付軌道如今支撐 StraitsX XSGD 穩定幣。

funding.en: Raised seed from 500 Startups, Quest Ventures, GGV, Eduardo Saverin; took $30M strategic investment in 2021 merger
funding.zh: 從 500 Startups、Quest Ventures、GGV、Eduardo Saverin 募得種子輪;2021 年合併獲 3,000 萬美元策略投資

sources.title: Tianwei Liu - Building StraitsX | Co-founder at Xfers

summary.en: On-demand network of vetted engineers, designers, and PMs that builds and manages custom software for enterprises.
summary.zh: 提供經審核的工程師、設計師與產品經理的隨需網絡,為企業打造並管理客製化軟體。

highlight.en: Backed by a16z, Redpoint, Marc Benioff, and Adam D'Angelo, Gigster pioneered AI-assisted distributed software teams and served 1,000+ customers including F100 firms. After raising ~$32M it was acquired by Ionic Partners in 2021 and later by Virtasant in 2024.
highlight.zh: 由 a16z、Redpoint、Marc Benioff 與 Adam D'Angelo 投資,Gigster 開創 AI 輔助的分散式軟體團隊,服務超過 1,000 家客戶,包括財星百大企業。募得約 3,200 萬美元後,於 2021 年被 Ionic Partners 收購,後於 2024 年被 Virtasant 收購。

funding.en: Raised ~$32M; acquired by Ionic Partners (2021), then Virtasant (2024)
funding.zh: 募得約 3,200 萬美元;2021 年被 Ionic Partners 收購,2024 年被 Virtasant 收購

summary.en: Latin America's leading on-demand delivery 'super-app' for food, groceries, retail, and financial services.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲領先的隨需外送「超級應用程式」,涵蓋餐飲、雜貨、零售與金融服務。

highlight.en: Rappi is YC's flagship Latin American breakout, a regional super-app backed by Sequoia, a16z, SoftBank, and DST across nine countries. It raised over $2.4B in total, including a $1B SoftBank-led Series E, and was last valued around $5.25B in 2021.
highlight.zh: Rappi 是 YC 在拉丁美洲的旗艦突破案例,獲 Sequoia、a16z、軟銀與 DST 投資,橫跨九個國家。累計募資超過 24 億美元,包括軟銀領投的 10 億美元 E 輪,2021 年最後估值約 52.5 億美元。

funding.en: Raised >$2.4B; last valued ~$5.25B (2021); backers include SoftBank, Sequoia, a16z, DST
funding.zh: 募資超過 24 億美元;2021 年最後估值約 52.5 億美元;投資者包括軟銀、Sequoia、a16z、DST

founders: Simón Borrero, Sebastián Mejía, Felipe Villamarín

summary.en: Aerospace company building 3D-printed rockets, including the Terran R reusable medium-heavy lift launch vehicle.
summary.zh: 航太公司,打造 3D 列印火箭,包括 Terran R 中重型可重複使用運載火箭。

highlight.en: Relativity flew Terran 1, the world's first largely 3D-printed rocket, becoming a YC hard-tech standout. It raised over $1.3B and was valued at $4.2B in 2021; in 2025 former Google CEO Eric Schmidt took over as CEO after a major investment.
highlight.zh: Relativity 發射了全球首枚主要由 3D 列印製成的火箭 Terran 1,成為 YC 硬科技代表。累計募資超過 13 億美元,2021 年估值 42 億美元;2025 年前 Google 執行長 Eric Schmidt 在重大投資後接任執行長。

funding.en: Raised >$1.3B; valued ~$4.2B (2021); backers include a16z, BlackRock, Fidelity, Eric Schmidt
funding.zh: 募資超過 13 億美元;2021 年估值約 42 億美元;投資者包括 a16z、BlackRock、Fidelity、Eric Schmidt

sources.title: Relativity Space launches its valuation to $4.2B | TechCrunch

summary.en: AI-powered lead management and customer communication platform used by 100,000+ local businesses.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的潛在客戶管理與顧客溝通平台,有超過 10 萬家在地企業使用。

highlight.en: Podium became a Utah 'Silicon Slopes' unicorn helping local businesses capture reviews and convert leads via text and AI. It raised over $420M and crossed a $3B valuation in its 2021 Series D led by Y Combinator-era backers Accel and IVP.
highlight.zh: Podium 成為猶他州「矽坡」的獨角獸,協助在地企業透過簡訊與 AI 收集評論並轉換潛在客戶。累計募資超過 4.2 億美元,在 2021 年由 Accel 與 IVP 領投的 D 輪估值突破 30 億美元。

funding.en: Raised >$420M; valued ~$3B (2021 Series D); backers include Accel, IVP, Y Combinator
funding.zh: 募資超過 4.2 億美元;2021 年 D 輪估值約 30 億美元;投資者包括 Accel、IVP、Y Combinator

sources.title: Podium scores $201M as valuation tops $3 billion | Deseret News

summary.en: AI-first creative subscription service blending global designers with proprietary tools for enterprise marketing teams.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的創意訂閱服務,結合全球設計師與自有工具,服務企業行銷團隊。

highlight.en: Superside reinvented the creative agency model for the AI era, serving Amazon, Microsoft, Reddit, and DoorDash with 800+ staff across 70+ countries. Since YC W16 it raised over $30M, led by a $30M Series A in 2021 from backers including Prosus and Freestyle.
highlight.zh: Superside 為 AI 時代重塑創意代理商模式,以橫跨 70 多國的 800 多名員工服務 Amazon、Microsoft、Reddit 與 DoorDash。自 YC W16 以來募資超過 3,000 萬美元,以 2021 年由 Prosus 與 Freestyle 等投資者領投的 3,000 萬美元 A 輪為主。

funding.en: Raised ~$33M; $30M Series A (2021); backers include Prosus Ventures, Freestyle, High Alpha
funding.zh: 募資約 3,300 萬美元;2021 年 3,000 萬美元 A 輪;投資者包括 Prosus Ventures、Freestyle、High Alpha

summary.en: Sales intelligence and engagement platform with a crowdsourced B2B contact database for go-to-market teams.
summary.zh: 銷售情報與互動平台,提供眾包的 B2B 聯絡人資料庫,服務市場開發團隊。

highlight.en: Apollo.io grew into a go-to-market unicorn serving 500,000+ companies and millions of sales professionals. Its August 2023 Series D raised $100M led by Bain Capital Ventures, nearly doubling its valuation to $1.6B on roughly $250M total raised.
highlight.zh: Apollo.io 成長為市場開發領域的獨角獸,服務超過 50 萬家公司與數百萬名銷售專業人士。2023 年 8 月的 D 輪由 Bain Capital Ventures 領投募得 1 億美元,估值幾乎翻倍至 16 億美元,累計募資約 2.5 億美元。

funding.en: Raised ~$250M; valued $1.6B (2023 Series D); backers include Bain Capital Ventures, Sequoia, Nexus
funding.zh: 募資約 2.5 億美元;2023 年 D 輪估值 16 億美元;投資者包括 Bain Capital Ventures、Sequoia、Nexus

founders: Tim Zheng, Roy Chung, Ray Li

sources.title: Apollo.io bags $100M at a $1.6B valuation | TechCrunch

summary.en: People management platform for performance reviews, engagement, and goals, used by thousands of companies.
summary.zh: 人才管理平台,涵蓋績效考核、員工敬業度與目標管理,有數千家公司使用。

highlight.en: Co-founded by Jack Altman (brother of OpenAI's Sam Altman), Lattice became a leading HR-tech unicorn for performance and people success. It raised over $320M and tripled its valuation to $3B in a 2022 Series F.
highlight.zh: 由 Jack Altman(OpenAI 創辦人 Sam Altman 的弟弟)共同創立,Lattice 成為績效與人才管理領域的領先 HR 科技獨角獸。累計募資超過 3.2 億美元,在 2022 年 F 輪估值翻三倍至 30 億美元。

funding.en: Raised >$320M; valued $3B (2022 Series F); backers include Tiger Global, Thrive, Khosla
funding.zh: 募資超過 3.2 億美元;2022 年 F 輪估值 30 億美元;投資者包括 Tiger Global、Thrive、Khosla

sources.title: Lattice raises $175M at a $3B valuation | TechCrunch

summary.en: Builds compact MicroGEO satellites delivering dedicated broadband to enterprises, governments, and the US military.
summary.zh: 打造小型 MicroGEO 衛星,為企業、政府與美軍提供專屬寬頻網路。

highlight.en: Astranis is a YC hard-tech standout pioneering small geostationary satellites with a $1B+ commercial backlog. It raised over $750M and grew to a ~$2.8B valuation, including a 2024 Series D led by a16z and a later $450M Series E round.
highlight.zh: Astranis 是 YC 硬科技代表,開創小型地球同步衛星,擁有超過 10 億美元的商業訂單。累計募資超過 7.5 億美元,估值成長至約 28 億美元,包括 2024 年由 a16z 領投的 D 輪與後續 4.5 億美元的 E 輪。

funding.en: Raised >$750M; valued ~$2.8B; backers include a16z, BlackRock, Fidelity, Franklin Templeton
funding.zh: 募資超過 7.5 億美元;估值約 28 億美元;投資者包括 a16z、BlackRock、Fidelity、Franklin Templeton

sources.title: Astranis Raises $450 Million Series E | Ventureburn

summary.en: Developer of self-driving software for long-haul semi trucks, first to complete an autonomous coast-to-coast drive.
summary.zh: 開發長途半掛卡車的自動駕駛軟體,是首家完成橫越美國東西岸自動駕駛的公司。

highlight.en: Embark was a YC autonomous-trucking pioneer that went public on Nasdaq via SPAC in 2021 at a $5.2B valuation. After the market turned, it was acquired by Applied Intuition in 2023 for about $71M.
highlight.zh: Embark 是 YC 自動駕駛卡車的先驅,2021 年透過 SPAC 在那斯達克上市,估值達 52 億美元。市場轉向後,於 2023 年被 Applied Intuition 以約 7,100 萬美元收購。

funding.en: SPAC IPO at $5.2B (2021); acquired by Applied Intuition for ~$71M (2023)
funding.zh: 2021 年 SPAC 上市估值 52 億美元;2023 年被 Applied Intuition 以約 7,100 萬美元收購

sources.title: Applied Intuition to buy autonomous trucking SPAC Embark for $71M | TechCrunch

summary.en: Telemedicine service prescribing birth control, PrEP, and at-home test kits delivered to patients' doors.
summary.zh: 遠距醫療服務,線上開立避孕藥、PrEP 與居家檢測試劑,並配送到患者家中。

highlight.en: Nurx pioneered direct-to-patient telehealth for birth control and PrEP, expanding access to reproductive and sexual health. In 2022 it merged with Thirty Madison to form a leading virtual specialty care platform under the Thirty Madison brand.
highlight.zh: Nurx 開創直接面向患者的避孕藥與 PrEP 遠距醫療,擴大生殖與性健康的可近性。2022 年與 Thirty Madison 合併,以 Thirty Madison 品牌組成領先的虛擬專科照護平台。

funding.en: Merged with Thirty Madison (2022); earlier backers include Union Square Ventures, Kleiner Perkins
funding.zh: 2022 年與 Thirty Madison 合併;早期投資者包括 Union Square Ventures、Kleiner Perkins

sources.title: Thirty Madison and Nurx to merge | PR Newswire

summary.en: Personal finance app (now Rocket Money) that tracks spending, cancels subscriptions, and lowers bills.
summary.zh: 個人理財應用程式(現為 Rocket Money),可追蹤支出、取消訂閱並協助降低帳單。

highlight.en: Truebill grew into a top personal-finance app that saved members over $100M by managing subscriptions and bills. In December 2021 Rocket Companies acquired it for $1.275B, rebranding it as Rocket Money.
highlight.zh: Truebill 成長為頂尖的個人理財應用程式,透過管理訂閱與帳單為會員省下超過 1 億美元。2021 年 12 月,Rocket Companies 以 12.75 億美元收購並更名為 Rocket Money。

funding.en: Acquired by Rocket Companies for $1.275B (2021); backers included Accel, Bessemer, Eldridge
funding.zh: 2021 年被 Rocket Companies 以 12.75 億美元收購;投資者包括 Accel、Bessemer、Eldridge

founders: Haroon Mokhtarzada, Idris Mokhtarzada, Yahya Mokhtarzada

sources.title: Rocket Companies buys Truebill for $1.275B | TechCrunch
FT Partners Advises Truebill on its $1,275,000,000 Sale
